name: io.github.AS215932/hyrule-cloud
title: Hyrule Cloud buyer
description: Discover and buy Hyrule Cloud x402 network diagnostics with wallet allowlists and durable spend caps.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: EVM wallet private key used only by the local official x402 client.

environmentVariables.name: HYRULE_MCP_MAX_PAYMENT_USD
environmentVariables.description: Hard USD maximum for one payment; defaults to 0.10.

environmentVariables.name: HYRULE_MCP_DAILY_BUDGET_USD
environmentVariables.description: UTC-day aggregate USD reservation cap; defaults to 1.00.
